item.title: Ramayana — Most Anticipated
item.description: Ranbir's Ram, Yash's Ravana, and a Hans Zimmer x AR Rahman score. If the film lands like this trailer, we're all done for.

item.title: Khatron Ke Khiladi 15 — On The Radar
item.description: Rohit Shetty's fear factory reopens in Cape Town, and this cast is pure chaos. Orry attempting stunts is reason enough.

item.title: Lock Upp 2 — On The Radar
item.description: The celebrity jail is back, now on Netflix with a fresh format. Confessions, controversy and zero chill incoming.

item.title: Alliance — Guilty Pleasure
item.description: Kunal Kemmu hosts a game built on trust, betrayal and very shaky alliances. Strategy nerds, this is your Roman Empire.

item.title: Dhamaal 4 — Background Watch
item.description: More noise than plot, but the interval block still lands a laugh. Leave your logic at the door and you'll survive it.

item.title: The Odyssey — Must Watch
item.description: Nolan doing Greek myth in IMAX is exactly as overwhelming as it sounds. See it on the biggest screen you can find.
